system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhluyke_reverse","body":"--IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE type = 'P' AND name = 'sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse') DROP PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse;
;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse
    @Nam INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET XACT_ABORT ON;

    DECLARE @Thang INT = 1;
    DECLARE @NgayDauThang DATE, @NgayCuoiThang DATE;

    PRINT CONCAT('=== BẮT ĐẦU TÍNH LŨY KẾ NĂM ', @Nam, ' ===');

    -- Xóa dữ liệu lũy kế cũ trong năm
    DELETE FROM tr_material_luyke WHERE YEAR(ngay) = @Nam;

    WHILE @Thang <= 12
    BEGIN
        SET @NgayDauThang = DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam, @Thang, 1);
        SET @NgayCuoiThang = EOMONTH(@NgayDauThang);

        PRINT CONCAT('>>> Đang xử lý tháng ', @Thang, '...');

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LuyKe') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #LuyKe;

        CREATE TABLE #LuyKe (
            mavt NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
            ngay DATE,
            sltondau DECIMAL(18,3),
            slnhap DECIMAL(18,3),
            slxuat DECIMAL(18,3),
            sltoncuoi DECIMAL(18,3),
            dgton DECIMAL(18,3),
            taikhoan NVARCHAR(50) NULL
        );

        -- Danh sách vật tư đang hoạt động
        INSERT INTO #LuyKe (mavt, ngay, sltondau, slnhap, slxuat, sltoncuoi, dgton)
        SELECT 
            t.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
            @NgayDauThang,
            0, 0, 0, 0, 0
        FROM tr_tonkho_sum t
        INNER JOIN tr_material m 
            ON m.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS = t.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
           AND m.xoa = 'N'
        GROUP BY t.mavt;

        -- Tồn đầu = tồn cuối tháng trước hoặc tồn hiện tại (sum nhapton)
        UPDATE l
        SET l.sltondau = ISNULL((
            SELECT TOP 1 sltoncuoi 
            FROM tr_material_luyke lk 
            WHERE lk.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS = l.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
              AND lk.loai = 'LuyKeThang'
              AND lk.ngay < @NgayDauThang
            ORDER BY lk.ngay DESC
        ), ISNULL((
            SELECT SUM(nhapton)
            FROM tr_tonkho_sum t
            WHERE t.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS = l.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
        ), 0))
        FROM #LuyKe l;

        -- Tổng nhập trong tháng
        UPDATE l
        SET l.slnhap = ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0),
            l.taikhoan = n.taikhoan
        FROM #LuyKe l
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT 
                n.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
                SUM(ISNULL(n.slnhap,0)) AS slnhap,
                MAX(ISNULL(n.taikhoan,'')) AS taikhoan
            FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
            INNER JOIN tr_phieunhap pn 
                ON pn.sopn = n.sopn
            WHERE pn.active = 1
              AND ISNULL(n.gianhap,0) > 0
              AND n.ngaynhap BETWEEN @NgayDauThang AND @NgayCuoiThang
            GROUP BY n.mavt
        ) n ON n.mavt = l.mavt;

        -- Tổng xuất trong tháng
        UPDATE l
        SET l.slxuat = ISNULL(x.slxuat, 0),
            l.taikhoan = COALESCE(l.taikhoan, x.taikhoan)
        FROM #LuyKe l
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT 
                x.mact COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
                SUM(ISNULL(x.soluong,0)) AS slxuat,
                MAX(ISNULL(x.taikhoan,'')) AS taikhoan
            FROM tr_ctphieuxuat x
            INNER JOIN tr_phieuxuat px 
                ON px.sopx = x.phieuxuat
            WHERE px.active = 1
              AND ISNULL(x.giaxuat,0) > 0
              AND x.ngaytao BETWEEN @NgayDauThang AND @NgayCuoiThang
            GROUP BY x.mact
        ) x ON x.mavt = l.mavt;

        -- Tính tồn cuối
        UPDATE #LuyKe
        SET sltoncuoi = sltondau + slnhap - slxuat;

        -- 💥 Bù âm tự động
        UPDATE #LuyKe
        SET sltondau = sltondau + ABS(sltoncuoi),
            sltoncuoi = 0
        WHERE sltoncuoi < 0;

        -- Ghi kết quả vào bảng chính
        INSERT INTO tr_material_luyke (Id, loai, mavt, ngay, sltondau, slnhap, slxuat, sltoncuoi, dgton, taikhoan)
        SELECT 
            NEWID(),
            'LuyKeThang',
            mavt,
            @NgayDauThang,
            ISNULL(sltondau,0),
            ISNULL(slnhap,0),
            ISNULL(slxuat,0),
            ISNULL(sltoncuoi,0),
            0,
            ISNULL(taikhoan,'')
        FROM #LuyKe;

        SET @Thang += 1;
    END;

    PRINT CONCAT('=== HOÀN TẤT LŨY KẾ NĂM ', @Nam, ' ===');
END;
;
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_material_luyke","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.l","dbo.tr_material_luyke"],"flags":["has-while","has-group-by","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
